bugReports.summary: Contact Form: Site console error detected: intlTelInput is not loaded.
bugReports.description: While testing "Contact form can be submitted with valid data" on https://ecommerce.folio3.com/, the run failed because Site console error detected: intlTelInput is not loaded. Additional signals: Console: intlTelInput is not loaded..
stepsToReproduce: Static suite validation for "Contact Form" using discovered pages.
Observe failure signal in console, network, layout, or form behavior.
bugReports.expectedResult: Form should render without JavaScript errors and allow valid submission with clear success feedback.
bugReports.actualResult: Site console error detected: intlTelInput is not loaded.
bugReports.suggestedFix: Fix the JavaScript error on the page and retest the affected user flow.
bugReports.businessImpact: Broken lead/contact flows can reduce inbound inquiries and support ticket quality.
bugReports.userImpact: Phone/country fields on contact forms may not initialize, blocking or confusing users who try to submit.
bugReports.revenueImpact: Indirect impact possible depending on page traffic and funnel position.
recoveryAttempts: Static suite validation for "Contact Form" using discovered pages.
